  "analysis": "The model achieved 0.6015 accuracy on the test set (below 0.62 target). Model size is 79.36 MB (well under 150MB). I need to increase accuracy. Let me try with higher dim (100), more epochs (20), and wordNgrams=3, larger bucket.",

    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 -c "
import fasttext

model = fasttext.train_supervised(
    input='/tmp/train.txt',
    lr=0.1,
    dim=100,
    ws=5,
    epoch=20,
    minCount=3,
    wordNgrams=3,
    bucket=500000,
    verbose=2
)

model.save_model('/app/model.bin')
print('Model saved')
import os
size_mb = os.path.getsize('/app/model.bin') / 1024 / 1024
print(f'Model size: {size_mb:.2f} MB')

result = model.test('/tmp/test.txt')
print(f'Test samples: {result[0]}, P@1: {result[1]:.4f}, R@1: {result[2]:.4f}')
"
